news.t: Stone Harbor Investment Partners Introduces Actively Managed Emerging Market High Yield Debt ETF

overview.description: The Virtus Stone Harbor Emerging Markets High Yield Bond ETF (VEMY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund is an actively managed, broad portfolio of emerging market high yield debt securities. The fund seeks current income and secondarily, capital appreciation. VEMY was launched on Dec 12, 2022 and is issued by Virtus Investment Partners.

data.title: Stone Harbor Investment Partners Introduces Actively Managed Emerging Market High Yield Debt ETF
data.text: VEMY, first ETF from Stone Harbor, invests in high yield sovereign and corporate debt sectors HARTFORD, Conn. , Dec. 19, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Stone Harbor Investment Partners, an affiliated manager of...
